x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Recording
x-enumeration-literals.description: Captures financial events and posts them to the relevant customer and ledger accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Posting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Applies interest accruals or charges to accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Posting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Posts fees, commissions, or charges to customer accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Balance Update
x-enumeration-literals.description: Updates the available and current balances after a transaction is posted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Ledger Integration
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that postings are reflected in the banks general ledger for accounting and reporting purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Validation & Controls
x-enumeration-literals.description: Verifies transaction details, account status, and posting rules before recording the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit & Traceability
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maintains a record of all postings for auditing, reconciliation, and regulatory compliance.
